changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Gram Type'

changeSet.comment: Create dictionary category for flora gram types

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Gram Type'

SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'Bacteriology Flora Gram Type' AND d.dict_entry = 'Bacilles Gram négatif'

changeSet.comment: Add flora gram type dictionary values
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, dict_entry, dictionary_category_id, is_active, display_key, lastupdated, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), gram_type, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Gram Type'), 'Y', 'bact.flora.gram.' || display_key, now(), row_num FROM ( VALUES ('Bacilles Gram négatif', 'bacille_neg', 1), ('Bacilles Gram positif', 'bacille_pos', 2), ('Cocci Gram négatif', 'cocci_neg', 3), ('Cocci Gram positif', 'cocci_pos', 4), ('Coccobacilles Gram négatif', 'coccobacille_neg', 5), ('Coccobacilles Gram positif', 'coccobacille_pos', 6) ) AS gram_types(gram_type, display_key, row_num);

delete.where: dictionary_category_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Gram Type')

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Grouping Mode'

changeSet.comment: Create dictionary category for flora grouping modes

changeSet.author: CIV Developer - Pk

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Grouping Mode'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON d.dictionary_category_id = dc.id WHERE dc.name = 'Bacteriology Flora Grouping Mode' AND d.dict_entry = 'Isolées'

changeSet.comment: Add flora grouping mode dictionary values
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, dict_entry, dictionary_category_id, is_active, display_key, lastupdated, sort_order) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), grouping_mode, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Grouping Mode'), 'Y', 'bact.flora.group.' || display_key, now(), row_num FROM ( VALUES ('Isolées', 'isolated', 1), ('Amas', 'cluster', 2), ('Courte chainette', 'short_chain', 3), ('Longue chainette', 'long_chain', 4), ('Grappe', 'bunch', 5), ('Tétrade', 'tetrad', 6), ('Diplo', 'diplo', 7) ) AS grouping_modes(grouping_mode, display_key, row_num);

delete.where: dictionary_category_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Grouping Mode')
